user.title: Ozon Package Tracker
user.description: Track Ozon marketplace packages via tracking.ozon.ru. Packages are added later with the ozon_package_tracker.add_tracking service or from the bundled Lovelace card.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Already configured. Only a single instance is allowed.

data_source.name: Data source
data_source.description: Where tracking data comes from, where the card's link points, and the Ozon cookie.

data_description.source: track365 (recommended): query track365.ru — works out of the box. Ozon: query tracking.ozon.ru directly, which requires a browser cookie because of the anti-bot.
data_description.verify_ssl: SSL verification is automatic: if track365's certificate is expired/invalid, the integration retries without it. Turn this off only to skip verification from the very first request.
data_description.link_target: Where the card's 'Open tracking page' button and the tracking_url attribute point to. Independent of the data source above — e.g. fetch data via track365 but open Ozon's page, or the other way round.
data_description.notify_targets: Devices/services (Home Assistant notify entities, e.g. your phone's mobile app) to push status-change notifications to. Leave empty to disable notifications.
data_description.notify_level: Which status changes send a notification.
data_description.cookie: Only used with source Ozon: the 'cookie' request header from a browser that opened tracking.ozon.ru (it expires and must be refreshed periodically).

remove_tracking.name: Remove tracking
remove_tracking.description: Stop tracking a package by tracking number or by entity.

refresh.name: Refresh
refresh.description: Refresh tracking data for all packages now.
